description: `[1 2][5]` (issue #407/F7): the postfix expression's base evaluates cleanly (the list literal `[1 2]`), but its `[5]` index segment is out of range — `ol-range` — exercising `readPostfixExpression`'s segment-resolution failure path in `evaluate.ts`, distinct from a base-evaluation failure.

diagnostics.message: index 5 is out of range for a list of 2.
